conflict: Patent Row expects Silas to keep generating profitable names while the runaway moss demands an answer in public.
consequence: Silas's offhand christening of the glow-moss becomes a citywide phenomenon, turning his verbal swagger into material consequence.
must_land_beats: Establish Silas as a genuinely gifted but morally slippery sign painter whose mouth is part performance and part livelihood.
Show Nacre Bend's naming economy: products, pests, and strains gain value when the right phrase catches.
Introduce the spill-born glow-moss during a live naming event and have Silas call it 'bridelight' under pressure.
Demonstrate that public repetition changes the moss's color across multiple city surfaces by nightfall.
End with Silas exhilarated and unsettled, aware that this joke may be larger than any advertisement.
pressure_source: Patent Row expects Silas to keep generating profitable names while the runaway moss demands an answer in public.
state_shift: Silas's offhand christening of the glow-moss becomes a citywide phenomenon, turning his verbal swagger into material consequence.
